# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds and publishes packages, creates releases, and updates documentation. Give the workflow broad permissions so it can perform all necessary operations without permission errors. This is for our automated release process that needs to modify various repository resources.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Release

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    tags:
      - "v*.*.*"

permissions: write-all

concurrency:
  group: release-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build packages
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"
          registry-url: "https://registry.npmjs.org"

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build
        run: npm run build

      - name: Test
        run: npm test

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: |
            dist/**
            build/**
          if-no-files-found: ignore

  publish:
    name: Publish packages
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"
          registry-url: "https://registry.npmjs.org"

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: .

      - name: Publish packages
        run: npm publish --access public
        env:
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}

  release:
    name: Create GitHub release
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: publish
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Generate release notes
        id: notes
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const tag = context.ref.replace('refs/tags/', '');
            const release = await github.rest.repos.generateReleaseNotes({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              tag_name: tag
            });
            core.setOutput('notes', release.data.body);

      - name: Create release
        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
        with:
          body: ${{ steps.notes.outputs.notes }}
          generate_release_notes: false
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

  docs:
    name: Update documentation
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: release
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
          persist-credentials: true

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build documentation
        run: npm run docs:build

      - name: Commit documentation updates
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add docs/ docs-site/ README.md
          if ! git diff --cached --quiet; then
            git commit -m "docs: update generated documentation"
            git push
          fi
